import ollama, time
start = time.time\(\)
r = ollama.chat\(model='llama3.2:3b', messages=[
    {'role': 'system', 'content': 'You are a fortune teller. Reply in one sentence.'},
    {'role': 'user', 'content': 'What does my future hold?'}
], options={'num_predict': 50}\)
print\(f'llama3.2:3b \({time.time\(\)-start:.2f}s\): {r[\\"message\\"][\\"content\\"]}'\)
" 2>&1)
